creator: tom@hur.st
text:
Created attachment 183922
Patch to 1.2.1

Update to 1.2.1.

This removes the dependency on procfs, and introduces a basic test suite, which is hooked up to make test.  cmake ninja support is disabled due to test breakage.

Poudriere tested on 10.3 amd64/i386 and 11.1-BETA3 amd64 with and without docs.
